title: lathyrus oleraceus var. arvense
intro: Lathyrus oleraceus var. arvense, also known as field pea or vetchling, is a plant species of the genus Lathyrus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially managing conditions like diabetes and high blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus oleraceus var. arvense include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use and preparation may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
